title: Add Wave 37 manager provider directory scorecard regression matrix
description: Add regression coverage for manager provider directory filters, provider profile scorecard payloads, and role guardrails while preserving the baseline provider list/detail contract.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix covers provider directory success and guardrail scenarios for manager flows
Assertions verify additive provider scorecard metadata and manager filters without breaking baseline nodes
Testing strategy references Wave 37 scope and protects current provider list/detail behavior
